name: forgekit
description: Project-level workflow harness for Codex, Claude Code, and adjacent AI coding tools, with intent routing, bounded loop policy, and opt-in native agent configuration templates.

interface.shortDescription: Project workflow harness for AI coding tools.
interface.longDescription: ForgeKit provides shared skills, project templates, read-only checks, intent routing, bounded loop policy templates, and opt-in reviewable native agent configuration templates for project initialization, handover, review, release, and safety gates across Codex and Claude Code. It does not provide automatic agent execution.
defaultPrompt: Use ForgeKit to initialize this project.
Use ForgeKit to run a handover review.
Use ForgeKit to check this project before release.
